### [`v4.10.0`](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-javascript/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#v4100-httpsgithubcomalgoliaalgoliasearch-client-javascriptcompare4934100)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-javascript/compare/4.9.3...4.10.0)

The `@algolia/client-recommendation` is now deprecated, please use `@algolia/client-personalization` instead. If you were using `initRecommendation` from the `algoliasearch` package, please use `initPersonalization` instead.

-   feat(recommend): introduce Recommend API client ([#​1280](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-javascript/issues/1280)) ([97ebde6](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-javascript/commit/97ebde6)), closes [#​1280](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-javascript/issues/1280) [#​1278](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-javascript/issues/1278)
-   feat(personalization): deprecate client-recommendation ([#​1278](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-javascript/issues/1278))
-   fix(rules): automaticOptionalFacetFilters type takes the same input as automaticFacetFilters ([#​1279](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-javascript/issues/1279)) ([831a3de](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-javascript/commit/831a3de)), closes [#​1279](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-javascript/issues/1279)
